---
title: "Zajęcia 2 – Data Science Workflow"
author: "Student"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# 1. Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
```

# 2. Data loading

```{r}
kraje <- read.csv("kraje.csv")
head(kraje)
```

# 3. Structure and summary

```{r}
str(kraje)
summary(kraje)
```

# 4. Missing values

```{r}
colSums(is.na(kraje))
```

# 5. Numeric data

```{r}
kraje_num <- kraje %>% select(where(is.numeric))
kraje_num
```

# 6. Correlation

```{r}
cor(kraje_num)
```

# 7. Plots

```{r}
hist(kraje_num[[1]])
boxplot(kraje_num[[2]])
plot(kraje_num[[1]], kraje_num[[2]])
```

# 8. Linear regression

```{r}
model <- lm(kraje_num[[1]] ~ kraje_num[[2]])
summary(model)
```
